name: Chocolate Pick-me-up Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
Preparation Time: 0:40
Heat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 pan. In a large bowl, combine all cake ingredients at low speed until moistened; beat for 2 minutes at high speed. Pour batter into the greased and floured pan. In a small bowl, combine all topping ingredients; mix well. Sprinkle evenly over the batter. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely.
